headline: Stocks Slide as Inflation Fears Lift Bond Yields

headline: United Airlines Receives Encouraging Tidings on the Labor Front
summary: UAL flight attendants ratify a 5-year deal: 31% average wage boost, boarding pay and $741M retro pay plus new job-security rules.
